violations.text: Thanksgiving calzones was observed held at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per interview with PIC, calzones were delivered 15 minutes prior. PIC moved to refrigerator at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Baby formula was observed with an expired date mark of (1/1/2025). See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
